macro.title: Multiple lawsuits claim Hometap violated TILA in HEI contracts
macro.what: The lawsuits allege Hometap improperly structured its home equity investment contracts as "Option Purchase Agreements" to avoid federal and state mortgage lending laws.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: GSEs release historical FICO 10T data, expand VantageScore 4.0 file
macro.what: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac on Wednesday released historical credit score data for FICO Score 10T and additional data for VantageScore 4.0.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The ROAD housing bill’s biggest breakthrough isn’t the investor ban. It’s supply.
housing.what: The ROAD to Housing Act expands factory-built housing options and directs an FHA pilot for mortgages of $100,000 or less to aid low-cost markets.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
